title: Three Decades of Mobility
description: Interactive data visualization exploring vehicle registration trends against cost-of-living data across 30 years of economic shifts.
longDescription: Analyzes how areas with different housing costs show varying patterns of vehicle ownership using CPI and economic indicators. Built with React, D3.js, and TypeScript — no charting library, custom scales and transitions throughout.
outcome: Published visualization revealing 30-year mobility and cost-of-living patterns. Custom D3 scales, no charting library dependencies.
